title: On Poet Prat. Epig.
content:
Prat he writes satires, but herein's the fault,
    In no one satire there's a mite of salt.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "On Poet Prat. Epig.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
